nodes.label: Layer-wise LR Decay / LLRD (paper story)
nodes.rationale: ULMFiT 2018 discriminative fine-tuning: give each layer its own LR — slow what downstream reads; the precedent for the middle-layer slowdown, mirror-flipped (GD reads SCFF's TOP, so slow the LATE layers).

nodes.label: Plasticity gradient (slow the read-layers)
nodes.rationale: Slow the late SCFF layers GD reads, keep front layers fast/plastic; physically = weaker update coupling / bigger smoothing cap, zero extra state; the cheap cousin of BYOL's EMA-view (brake vs copy).
